title: Ethiopian Macaroni Stir Fry
description: A creamy, savory twist on traditional macaroni. Stir-fried with an Ethiopian flair, this dish combines the best of both worlds.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the stir-fry mix and cook until thawed.
Add the frozen peas and cook until tender.
In a separate bowl, mix the savory sauce and creamy sauce.
Add the sauce mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked macaroni to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
